description: Resource Type definition for AWS::RTBFabric::LinkRoutingRule. A routing rule on a link within RTB Fabric that controls request routing based on conditions such as host headers, path matching, and query string parameters.

GatewayId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^rtb-gw-[a-z0-9-]{1,25}$  
Update requires: No interruption

LinkId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^link-[a-z0-9-]{1,25}$  
Update requires: No interruption

RuleId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^rule-[a-z0-9-]{1,25}$  
Update requires: No interruption

RuleStatus.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATION_IN_PROGRESS | ACTIVE | UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS | DELETION_IN_PROGRESS | DELETED | FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption

RulePriority.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.description: Query string key — RFC 3986 unreserved characters.
Key.markdownDescription:
Query string key — RFC 3986 unreserved characters.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9._~-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.description: Query string value — RFC 3986 unreserved characters.
Value.markdownDescription:
Query string value — RFC 3986 unreserved characters.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9._~-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

QueryStringKeyValuePair.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

RuleCondition.description: Conditions for a routing rule. All non-null fields must match (AND logic). At least one field must be set. HostHeader and HostHeaderWildcard are mutually exclusive. PathPrefix and PathExact are mutually exclusive.

HostHeader.description: Exact host match — RFC 3986 unreserved characters. Mutually exclusive with HostHeaderWildcard.
HostHeader.markdownDescription:
Exact host match — RFC 3986 unreserved characters. Mutually exclusive with HostHeaderWildcard.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9._~-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

HostHeaderWildcard.description: Wildcard host pattern (e.g., *.example.com) — RFC 3986 unreserved characters plus *. Mutually exclusive with HostHeader.
HostHeaderWildcard.markdownDescription:
Wildcard host pattern (e.g., *.example.com) — RFC 3986 unreserved characters plus *. Mutually exclusive with HostHeader.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9._~*-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

PathPrefix.description: Path prefix matching — strict starts-with, must start with /. Mutually exclusive with PathExact.
PathPrefix.markdownDescription:
Path prefix matching — strict starts-with, must start with /. Mutually exclusive with PathExact.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^/[A-Za-z0-9._~/-]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

PathExact.description: Exact path match — must start with /. Mutually exclusive with PathPrefix.
PathExact.markdownDescription:
Exact path match — must start with /. Mutually exclusive with PathPrefix.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^/[A-Za-z0-9._~/-]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

QueryStringEquals.description: Query string key=value pair match (single pair).
QueryStringEquals.markdownDescription:
Query string key=value pair match (single pair).

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

QueryStringExists.description: Query string key presence check (any value accepted).
QueryStringExists.markdownDescription:
Query string key presence check (any value accepted).

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9._~-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

RuleCondition.markdownDescription:
Conditions for a routing rule. All non-null fields must match (AND logic). At least one field must be set. HostHeader and HostHeaderWildcard are mutually exclusive. PathPrefix and PathExact are mutually exclusive.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Arn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:aws:rtbfabric:[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+:[0-9]{12}:gateway/[a-zA-Z0-9-]+/link/[a-zA-Z0-9-]+/routing-rule/[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

CreatedTimestamp.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

UpdatedTimestamp.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Key.description: The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.description: The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
